title: UI Test Overuse Auditor
description: Scan Playwright, WebdriverIO, and Selenium/WebDriver suites in any language (TS/JS, Python, Java, C#, Ruby) to find where UI/E2E tests are overused. For each, decide keep-as-UI, demote-to-API, or demote-to-unit — collapsing data-driven repetition into API tests and keeping only genuine browser journeys at the top.
